hero.subtext: We are a welcoming community uniting our skills to share knowledge, create projects, and have fun together. Join us to connect with like-minded individuals!

software.title: Software
software.text: We welcome all developers, from beginners to experts, to collaborate and share their knowledge and experiences!

designers.title: Designers
designers.text: We welcome all designers, from illustrators to 3D artists, to collaborate and share their art and ideas!

entrepreneurs.title: Entrepreneurs
entrepreneurs.text: Meet with like-minded people and build meaningful connections within our community!

other.title: And What Else?
other.text: Whatever you're passionate about, join us in building a vibrant community of creators and innovators!

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To redefine the architecture of multi-participant projects and professional networking. We envision a future where the weight of "finding the right team" is put away. Our goal is to create a high-efficiency environment with collective power of a hyper-connected community.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To enhance professional growth by simplifying the way people connect. At Axonode, we connect the subjects of career and giving the people a network they don't have to worry about, making business networking intuitive and accessible. By creating a global ecosystem for voluntary project participation, we give every developer, designer, and entrepreneur a platform to contribute their skills and build their portfolio.

header.title: Lets Build
header.description: Have an idea or suggestion about Axonode? Drop us a line. We are always looking for new perspectives.

success.thanks: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you soon.

success.title: Application
success.message: Thank you for applying to Axonode. Our team will review your profile and reach out via Email or Your primary way of contact soon.

agreement.text: I have read and agree to the {tos} and {coc}.

reason.label: What motivates you to join Axonode?

validation.must_agree: You Must Accept the Terms Of Service and Code of conduct
validation.select_interest: Please select an area of interest.
validation.select_sub_interest: Please select at least one sub-interest.
validation.generic_error:
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Error: {error}

community.title: What is this Community?
community.description: We're building a talented, innovative team of creators, builders, and thinkers. Whether you're into tech, design, strategy, or creative work collaboration and growth are at the center of what we do.

review.title: Application Review Process
review.description: Every application is carefully reviewed. We look at mindset, commitment, and alignment not just experience level.

next_steps.title: What Happens Next
next_steps.description: If your application is accepted, you'll receive an email with the next steps. Please make sure your contact information is correct and check your inbox regularly.

invited.title: {userName} you've been
invited.subtitle: This isn't a mass invite — someone on our team specifically chose {userName} for this.

why_section.title: Why {userName}?
why_section.paragraph_1: Someone on our team came across your profile and didn't just scroll past, they stopped, took notice, and decided {userName} was worth reaching out to directly. That doesn't happen often.
why_section.paragraph_2: When you complete your profile, your application will be marked {invited} in our system. That means no waiting in the queue, no being one of thousands — you'll be reviewed as someone who was hand-picked, because you were.
why_section.paragraph_3: {userName}, this is your moment. Don't let someone else's confidence in you go to waste.

error.invalid_invite: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.

not_found.title: Not Found??
not_found.desc: The page you are looking for might have been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable.

wavefy.title: Wavefy App
wavefy.subtitle: A user-friendly music app
wavefy.leftDesc: A user friendly music app developed by Axonode Team.

voltx.title: VoltX Robotics
voltx.subtitle: First Robotics Competition Team
voltx.leftDesc: A Turkiye located FRC team powered by Axonode Team.

soon.title: In Development
soon.subtitle: Next project is under development
soon.leftDesc: Axonode will keep developing new projects.
